<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Hotel Golden Petals & Banquets — Greater Noida</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,600&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --gold: #C8973A;
  --gold2: #E8C97A;
  --gold-dark: #8B6510;
  --dark: #0E0C08;
  --dark2: #1A1710;
  --ivory: #FAF6EE;
  --stone: #5A5040;
  --mist: #EDE5D4;
  --white: #FFFEF9;
  --wa: #25D366;
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--white);color:var(--dark);overflow-x:hidden}

/* ——— SCROLLBAR ——— */
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--dark)}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--gold)}

/* ——— NAV ——— */
#nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:999;padding:18px 5%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;transition:.4s;background:transparent}
#nav.scrolled{background:rgba(14,12,8,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);padding:12px 5%}
.nav-logo{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:22px;color:#fff;text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:1px}
.nav-logo span{color:var(--gold)}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:32px;list-style:none}
.nav-links a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);text-decoration:none;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:400;transition:.2s}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--gold)}
.nav-wa{background:var(--wa);color:#fff;padding:10px 22px;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;font-weight:500;border-radius:2px;transition:.2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.nav-wa:hover{background:#1ebe5a;transform:translateY(-1px)}
#hamburger{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:pointer}
#hamburger span{width:24px;height:2px;background:#fff;transition:.3s}
#mobile-menu{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(14,12,8,.97);z-index:998;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:36px}
#mobile-menu.open{display:flex}
#mobile-menu a{color:#fff;text-decoration:none;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:28px;transition:.2s}
#mobile-menu a:hover{color:var(--gold)}

/* ——— HERO ——— */
#hero{position:relative;height:100vh;min-height:600px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden}
.hero-img{position:absolute;inset:0;background-size:cover;background-position:center 30%;transition:transform 8s ease}
#hero:hover .hero-img{transform:scale(1.04)}
.hero-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(170deg,rgba(10,8,3,.75) 0%,rgba(10,8,3,.45) 50%,rgba(10,8,3,.8) 100%)}
.hero-inner{position:relative;text-align:center;padding:0 20px;max-width:900px}
.hero-tag{display:inline-block;border:1px solid var(--gold2);color:var(--gold2);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:5px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:7px 22px;margin-bottom:28px;animation:fadeUp 1s .2s both}
.hero h1{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(48px,7vw,90px);font-weight:700;color:#fff;line-height:1.05;margin-bottom:20px;animation:fadeUp 1s .4s both}
.hero h1 em{color:var(--gold2);font-style:italic}
.hero-sub{font-size:13px;letter-spacing:4px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:48px;animation:fadeUp 1s .6s both}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;animation:fadeUp 1s .8s both}
.btn-gold{background:var(--gold);color:#fff;padding:14px 38px;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;font-weight:500;transition:.25s;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif}
.btn-gold:hover{background:var(--gold-dark);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.btn-ghost{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4);color:#fff;padding:14px 38px;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;font-weight:400;transition:.25s;background:transparent}
.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--gold2);color:var(--gold2)}
.hero-scroll{position:absolute;bottom:36px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;animation:bounce 2s infinite}
@keyframes bounce{0%,100%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(6px)}}
.hero-scroll-line{width:1px;height:36px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2)}

/* ——— ANIMATIONS ——— */
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(32px);transition:opacity .7s ease,transform .7s ease}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.reveal-left{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-32px);transition:opacity .7s ease,transform .7s ease}
.reveal-left.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}
.reveal-right{opacity:0;transform:translateX(32px);transition:opacity .7s ease,transform .7s ease}
.reveal-right.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}

/* ——— GOLD DIVIDER ——— */
.divider{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;max-width:180px;margin:20px auto 0}
.d-line{flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--gold)}
.d-gem{width:7px;height:7px;background:var(--gold);transform:rotate(45deg)}

/* ——— SECTION COMMON ——— */
.sec{padding:100px 8%}
.sec-tag{display:block;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:14px;font-weight:500}
.sec-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(34px,4vw,56px);font-weight:600;line-height:1.1;color:var(--dark)}
.sec-title em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold-dark)}

/* ——— STATS STRIP ——— */
.stats-strip{background:var(--dark2);padding:48px 8%;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1px;border-top:2px solid var(--gold)}
.stat-item{text-align:center;padding:32px 20px;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)}
.stat-item:last-child{border-right:none}
.stat-n{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:48px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gold);display:block;line-height:1}
.stat-l{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);margin-top:8px;display:block}

/* ——— ABOUT ——— */
.about{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:center;background:var(--ivory)}
.about-text p{font-size:16px;line-height:1.85;color:var(--stone);margin-top:20px}
.about-img-wrap{position:relative}
.about-img-main{width:100%;height:480px;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.about-corner{position:absolute;top:-14px;right:-14px;width:70px;height:70px;border-top:2px solid var(--gold);border-right:2px solid var(--gold)}
.about-badge{position:absolute;bottom:-20px;left:-20px;background:var(--gold);color:#fff;padding:18px 24px;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:600;line-height:1;text-align:center}
.about-badge small{display:block;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:400;margin-top:4px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.8)}

/* ——— ROOMS ——— */
.rooms{background:var(--white)}
.rooms-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:60px}
.rooms-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px}
.room-card{position:relative;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer}
.room-card img{width:100%;height:280px;object-fit:cover;display:block;transition:.5s}
.room-card:hover img{transform:scale(1.07)}
.room-info{padding:24px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--mist);border-top:none}
.room-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:600;color:var(--dark);margin-bottom:8px}
.room-price{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);font-weight:500}
.room-desc{font-size:14px;color:var(--stone);line-height:1.7;margin-top:10px}
.room-tag{position:absolute;top:16px;right:0;background:var(--gold);color:#fff;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:6px 16px}

/* ——— EVENTS ——— */
.events{background:var(--dark);padding:100px 8%}
.events-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:70px}
.events-header .sec-title{color:#fff}
.events-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:2px}
.event-card{position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:var(--dark2)}
.event-card img{width:100%;height:260px;object-fit:cover;display:block;opacity:.6;transition:.4s}
.event-card:hover img{opacity:.3;transform:scale(1.06)}
.event-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;padding:24px;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(10,8,3,.9) 0%,transparent 60%)}
.event-icon{font-size:28px;margin-bottom:10px;transition:.3s}
.event-card:hover .event-icon{transform:scale(1.2)}
.event-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:18px;color:#fff;font-weight:600;text-align:center}
.event-desc{font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);text-align:center;margin-top:6px;line-height:1.5;max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:.4s}
.event-card:hover .event-desc{max-height:60px}

/* ——— BANQUET ——— */
.banquet{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;background:var(--ivory)}
.banquet-img{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.banquet-img img{width:100%;height:100%;min-height:500px;object-fit:cover;display:block;transition:.5s}
.banquet-img:hover img{transform:scale(1.04)}
.banquet-content{padding:80px 60px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
.banquet-content .sec-tag{margin-bottom:12px}
.banquet-content p{font-size:15px;line-height:1.85;color:var(--stone);margin:20px 0 28px}
.banquet-list{list-style:none}
.banquet-list li{padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--mist);font-size:14px;color:var(--stone);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.banquet-list li::before{content:'◆';color:var(--gold);font-size:8px;flex-shrink:0}

/* ——— PACKAGES ——— */
.packages{background:var(--white)}
.packages-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:60px}
.pkg-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:28px}
.pkg-card{border:1px solid var(--mist);padding:40px 32px;position:relative;transition:.3s}
.pkg-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(200,151,58,.1)}
.pkg-card.featured{background:var(--dark);border-color:var(--gold)}
.pkg-icon{font-size:32px;margin-bottom:16px;display:block}
.pkg-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:600;color:var(--dark);margin-bottom:8px}
.pkg-card.featured .pkg-name{color:#fff}
.pkg-price{font-size:28px;font-weight:500;color:var(--gold);font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;margin-bottom:4px}
.pkg-per{font-size:11px;color:var(--stone);letter-spacing:1px}
.pkg-card.featured .pkg-per{color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)}
.pkg-features{list-style:none;margin:24px 0 32px}
.pkg-features li{font-size:13px;color:var(--stone);padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--mist);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.pkg-card.featured .pkg-features li{color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.1)}
.pkg-features li::before{content:'✓';color:var(--gold);font-weight:600;flex-shrink:0}
.pkg-badge{position:absolute;top:-12px;right:24px;background:var(--gold);color:#fff;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 14px}

/* ——— GALLERY ——— */
.gallery{background:var(--dark);padding:100px 8%}
.gallery-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:60px}
.gallery-header .sec-title{color:#fff}
.gallery-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);grid-template-rows:auto auto;gap:3px}
.gallery-item{overflow:hidden;position:relative;cursor:pointer}
.gallery-item img{width:100%;height:100%;min-height:220px;object-fit:cover;display:block;transition:.5s;filter:brightness(.85)}
.gallery-item:hover img{transform:scale(1.08);filter:brightness(1)}
.gallery-item.tall{grid-row:span 2}
.gallery-item.wide{grid-column:span 2}
.gallery-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(10,8,3,0);transition:.3s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.gallery-item:hover .gallery-overlay{background:rgba(200,151,58,.15)}
.gallery-zoom{color:#fff;font-size:20px;opacity:0;transition:.3s;background:rgba(200,151,58,.8);width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.gallery-item:hover .gallery-zoom{opacity:1}

/* ——— LIGHTBOX ——— */
#lightbox{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.95);z-index:9999;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
#lightbox.open{display:flex}
#lightbox img{max-width:90vw;max-height:88vh;object-fit:contain}
#lb-close{position:absolute;top:20px;right:28px;color:#fff;font-size:32px;cursor:pointer;line-height:1}
#lb-prev,#lb-next{position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:#fff;border:none;font-size:24px;padding:14px 18px;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s}
#lb-prev:hover,#lb-next:hover{background:var(--gold)}
#lb-prev{left:20px}
#lb-next{right:20px}

/* ——— REVIEWS ——— */
.reviews{padding:100px 8%;background:var(--ivory)}
.reviews-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:60px}
.reviews-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:32px;margin:28px 0 50px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.review-platform{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:14px 24px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--mist)}
.rev-score{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:32px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gold)}
.rev-info{text-align:left}
.rev-info strong{display:block;font-size:12px;font-weight:500}
.rev-info span{font-size:11px;color:var(--stone)}
.stars{color:var(--gold);font-size:14px;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:2px}
.reviews-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px}
.review-card{background:#fff;padding:32px;border:1px solid var(--mist);transition:.3s;position:relative}
.review-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold);box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}
.review-card::before{content:'"';font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:80px;color:var(--gold2);line-height:.7;opacity:.4;position:absolute;top:16px;left:20px}
.review-text{font-size:14px;line-height:1.8;color:var(--stone);margin-bottom:20px;position:relative;z-index:1;padding-top:20px}
.review-author{font-weight:500;font-size:13px;color:var(--dark)}
.review-via{font-size:11px;color:var(--stone);letter-spacing:1px;margin-top:3px}

/* ——— INQUIRY / BOOKING ——— */
#booking{background:var(--dark);padding:100px 8%}
.booking-wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.2fr;gap:80px;align-items:start}
.booking-info .sec-title{color:#fff}
.booking-info p{font-size:15px;line-height:1.85;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);margin:20px 0 36px}
.contact-items{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px}
.ci{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:14px}
.ci-icon{width:40px;height:40px;background:rgba(200,151,58,.15);border:1px solid var(--gold);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:16px;flex-shrink:0}
.ci-text strong{display:block;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:4px}
.ci-text span{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6)}
.booking-form-wrap{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);padding:48px}
.form-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:20px;margin-bottom:20px}
.form-field{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-bottom:0}
.form-field.full{grid-column:1/-1}
.form-field label{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)}
.form-field input,.form-field select,.form-field textarea{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:#fff;padding:13px 16px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;outline:none;transition:.2s}
.form-field input:focus,.form-field select:focus,.form-field textarea:focus{border-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(200,151,58,.06)}
.form-field input::placeholder,.form-field textarea::placeholder{color:rgba(255,255,255,.25)}
.form-field select option{background:#1A1710;color:#fff}
.form-field textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:100px}
.wa-book{background:var(--wa);color:#fff;padding:16px 36px;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:500;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;border:none;cursor:pointer;width:100%;margin-top:8px;transition:.2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px}
.wa-book:hover{background:#1ebe5a;transform:translateY(-2px)}
.wa-icon{font-size:18px}
.form-note{font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);text-align:center;margin-top:14px}

/* ——— FLOATING WA ——— */
#wa-float{position:fixed;bottom:28px;right:28px;z-index:998;width:56px;height:56px;background:var(--wa);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:26px;text-decoration:none;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(37,211,102,.4);animation:waPulse 2.5s infinite}
@keyframes waPulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(37,211,102,.4)}50%{box-shadow:0 4px 30px rgba(37,211,102,.7)}}

/* ——— LOCATION ——— */
.location{background:var(--dark2);display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
.loc-info{padding:80px 8%}
.loc-info .sec-title{color:#fff}
.loc-details{margin-top:40px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:24px}
.ld{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start}
.ld-icon{font-size:20px;margin-top:2px}
.ld strong{display:block;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:4px}
.ld span{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);line-height:1.7}
.loc-map{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.loc-map iframe{width:100%;height:100%;min-height:400px;border:none;filter:grayscale(.4) contrast(1.1)}

/* ——— FOOTER ——— */
footer{background:var(--dark);border-top:1px solid rgba(200,151,58,.2);padding:70px 8% 30px}
.footer-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:60px;margin-bottom:60px}
.foot-logo{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:24px;color:#fff;margin-bottom:16px;display:block}
.foot-logo span{color:var(--gold)}
.foot-desc{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);line-height:1.8}
.foot-socials{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:24px}
.foot-social{width:36px;height:36px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-decoration:none;font-size:14px;transition:.2s}
.foot-social:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold)}
.foot-heading{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:20px;display:block}
.foot-links{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px}
.foot-links a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);text-decoration:none;font-size:14px;transition:.2s}
.foot-links a:hover{color:var(--gold)}
.foot-bottom{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);padding-top:28px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px}
.foot-bottom span{font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3)}
.foot-bottom a{color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none}

/* ——— RESPONSIVE ——— */
@media(max-width:1024px){
  .rooms-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .events-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .stats-strip{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .pkg-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:40px}
}
@media(max-width:768px){
  .nav-links,.nav-wa{display:none}
  #hamburger{display:flex}
  #hero h1{font-size:clamp(38px,8vw,60px)}
  .about,.banquet,.location{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .booking-wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .form-row{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .gallery-item.wide{grid-column:span 1}
  .gallery-item.tall{grid-row:span 1}
  .reviews-grid,.rooms-grid,.pkg-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .events-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .stats-strip{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .sec,.loc-info{padding:70px 6%}
  .banquet-content{padding:50px 6%}
  .booking-form-wrap{padding:30px 24px}
}
@media(max-width:480px){
  .events-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .stats-strip{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- LIGHTBOX -->
<div id="lightbox">
  <span id="lb-close" onclick="closeLB()">✕</span>
  <button id="lb-prev" onclick="lbNav(-1)">‹</button>
  <img id="lb-img" src="" alt="">
  <button id="lb-next" onclick="lbNav(1)">›</button>
</div>

<!-- FLOATING WHATSAPP -->
<a href="https://wa.me/919266271835?text=Hello!%20I%20want%20to%20enquire%20about%20Hotel%20Golden%20Petals." target="_blank" id="wa-float" title="Chat on WhatsApp">💬</a>

<!-- MOBILE MENU -->
<div id="mobile-menu">
  <a href="#about" onclick="closeMob()">About</a>
  <a href="#rooms" onclick="closeMob()">Rooms</a>
  <a href="#events" onclick="closeMob()">Events</a>
  <a href="#banquet" onclick="closeMob()">Banquet</a>
  <a href="#gallery" onclick="closeMob()">Gallery</a>
  <a href="#reviews" onclick="closeMob()">Reviews</a>
  <a href="#booking" onclick="closeMob()">Book Now</a>
</div>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="nav">
  <a class="nav-logo" href="#">Golden <span>Petals</span></a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#rooms">Rooms</a></li>
    <li><a href="#events">Events</a></li>
    <li><a href="#banquet">Banquet</a></li>
    <li><a href="#gallery">Gallery</a></li>
    <li><a href="#reviews">Reviews</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="https://wa.me/919266271835?text=Hello!%20I%20want%20to%20book%20a%20room." target="_blank" class="nav-wa">
    <span>💬</span> Book via WhatsApp
  </a>
  <div id="hamburger" onclick="toggleMob()">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-img" id="heroBg"></div>
  <div class="hero-overlay"></div>
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-tag">Greater Noida · Gaur City 1</div>
    <h1>Hotel Golden<br><em>Petals</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Hotel &amp; Banquets · Greater Noida</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#booking" class="btn-gold">Book Your Stay</a>
      <a href="#banquet" class="btn-ghost">Explore Banquet</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-scroll">
    <div class="hero-scroll-line"></div>
    <span>Scroll</span>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- STATS STRIP -->
<div class="stats-strip">
  <div class="stat-item reveal">
    <span class="stat-n">42</span>
    <span class="stat-l">Premium Rooms</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item reveal" style="transition-delay:.1s">
    <span class="stat-n">350</span>
    <span class="stat-l">Guest Capacity</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item reveal" style="transition-delay:.2s">
    <span class="stat-n">4.1<small style="font-size:24px">★</small></span>
    <span class="stat-l">Rating · 448 Reviews</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item reveal" style="transition-delay:.3s">
    <span class="stat-n">24/7</span>
    <span class="stat-l">Room Service</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section class="about sec" id="about">
  <div class="about-text reveal-left">
    <span class="sec-tag">Our Story</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Where Every Stay Becomes<br>a <em>Memory</em></h2>
    <p>Hotel Golden Petals & Banquets is a premier destination nestled in the heart of Gaur City 1, Greater Noida. We are more than just a hotel — we are a one-stop destination for exceptional stays and unforgettable celebrations.</p>
    <p>Whether you are visiting for business or leisure, hosting a wedding, or celebrating life's milestones, our team is dedicated to delivering warmth, comfort, and gracious hospitality at every step.</p>
    <br>
    <a href="#booking" class="btn-gold" style="display:inline-block;margin-top:8px">Enquire Now</a>
  </div>
  <div class="about-img-wrap reveal-right">
    <img class="about-img-main" id="aboutImg" src="" alt="Hotel Golden Petals">
    <div class="about-corner"></div>
    <div class="about-badge">5★<small>Hospitality</small></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ROOMS -->
<section class="rooms sec" id="rooms">
  <div class="rooms-header reveal">
    <span class="sec-tag">Accommodation</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Our <em>Rooms & Suites</em></h2>
    <div class="divider"><div class="d-line"></div><div class="d-gem"></div><div class="d-line"></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="rooms-grid">
    <div class="room-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.1s">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1631049307264-da0ec9d70304?w=800&q=80" alt="Deluxe Room">
      <div class="room-info">
        <div class="room-name">Deluxe Room</div>
        <div class="room-price">Starting ₹2,000 / night</div>
        <div class="room-desc">Comfortable, well-appointed rooms with modern amenities, AC, LED TV, free Wi-Fi and daily housekeeping.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="room-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.2s">
      <div class="room-tag">Popular</div>
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1590490360182-c33d57733427?w=800&q=80" alt="Super Deluxe Room">
      <div class="room-info">
        <div class="room-name">Super Deluxe Room</div>
        <div class="room-price">Starting ₹2,800 / night</div>
        <div class="room-desc">Spacious rooms with upgraded interiors, premium bedding, mini-fridge and a stunning view of the city.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="room-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.3s">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1578683010236-d716f9a3f461?w=800&q=80" alt="Suite">
      <div class="room-info">
        <div class="room-name">Executive Suite</div>
        <div class="room-price">Starting ₹4,500 / night</div>
        <div class="room-desc">Our finest suites with a separate living area, premium toiletries, priority room service and exclusive amenities.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EVENTS -->
<section class="events" id="events">
  <div class="events-header reveal">
    <span class="sec-tag" style="color:var(--gold2)">Celebrations We Host</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Every Occasion,<br><em style="color:var(--gold2)">Perfectly Crafted</em></h2>
    <div class="divider" style="margin-top:20px"><div class="d-line"></div><div class="d-gem"></div><div class="d-line"></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="events-grid">
    <div class="event-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.05s">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519225421980-715cb0215aed?w=600&q=80" alt="Wedding">
      <div class="event-overlay">
        <span class="event-icon">💍</span>
        <div class="event-name">Marriage</div>
        <div class="event-desc">Grand wedding celebrations with décor, catering & coordination.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="event-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.1s">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1464349153735-7db50ed83c84?w=600&q=80" alt="Birthday">
      <div class="event-overlay">
        <span class="event-icon">🎂</span>
        <div class="event-name">Birthday Party</div>
        <div class="event-desc">Make every birthday milestone truly memorable and special.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="event-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.15s">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1522673607200-164d1b6ce486?w=600&q=80" alt="Anniversary">
      <div class="event-overlay">
        <span class="event-icon">💞</span>
        <div class="event-name">Anniversary</div>
        <div class="event-desc">Celebrate years of togetherness in a beautiful, intimate setting.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="event-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.2s">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4?w=600&q=80" alt="Ring Ceremony">
      <div class="event-overlay">
        <span class="event-icon">💎</span>
        <div class="event-name">Ring Ceremony</div>
        <div class="event-desc">Elegant engagement ceremonies with floral décor & setup.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="event-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.25s">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1583939003579-730e3918a45a?w=600&q=80" alt="Mehndi">
      <div class="event-overlay">
        <span class="event-icon">🌿</span>
        <div class="event-name">Mehndi Night</div>
        <div class="event-desc">Vibrant pre-wedding mehndi celebrations full of colour & joy.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="event-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.3s">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551882547-ff40c63fe5fa?w=600&q=80" alt="Kitty Party">
      <div class="event-overlay">
        <span class="event-icon">🥂</span>
        <div class="event-name">Kitty Party</div>
        <div class="event-desc">Exclusive kitty gatherings with curated menus & arrangements.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="event-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.35s">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540575467063-178a50c2df87?w=600&q=80" alt="Corporate">
      <div class="event-overlay">
        <span class="event-icon">💼</span>
        <div class="event-name">Corporate Events</div>
        <div class="event-desc">Conferences, seminars & team meets with full AV support.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="event-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.4s">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1530103862676-de8c9debad1d?w=600&q=80" alt="More Events">
      <div class="event-overlay">
        <span class="event-icon">✨</span>
        <div class="event-name">Custom Events</div>
        <div class="event-desc">Baby showers, Puja ceremonies, farewell parties & more.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:50px">
    <a href="#booking" class="btn-gold">Enquire About Your Event</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- BANQUET -->
<section class="banquet" id="banquet">
  <div class="banquet-img reveal-left">
    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519167758481-83f550bb49b3?w=900&q=80" alt="Banquet Hall">
  </div>
  <div class="banquet-content reveal-right">
    <span class="sec-tag">The Grand Hall</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Banquet Hall<br>for Every <em>Dream</em></h2>
    <p>Our banquet hall can accommodate up to 350 floating guests (200 seated), making it perfect for weddings, receptions, corporate events and all social gatherings. With in-house catering, dedicated event planners, and full décor services — we handle every detail.</p>
    <ul class="banquet-list">
      <li>Capacity: 200 seated · 350 floating</li>
      <li>In-house veg & non-veg catering (₹700–₹850/plate)</li>
      <li>Weddings, receptions & pre-wedding functions</li>
      <li>Corporate conferences & seminars</li>
      <li>Dedicated event planning & coordination</li>
      <li>Full AV setup, décor & floral arrangements</li>
      <li>Residential wedding packages available</li>
      <li>42 rooms for guests staying overnight</li>
    </ul>
    <a href="#booking" class="btn-gold" style="display:inline-block;margin-top:32px">Get Banquet Quote</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PACKAGES -->
<section class="packages sec" id="packages">
  <div class="packages-header reveal">
    <span class="sec-tag">Pricing</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Event <em>Packages</em></h2>
    <div class="divider"><div class="d-line"></div><div class="d-gem"></div><div class="d-line"></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="pkg-grid">
    <div class="pkg-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.1s">
      <span class="pkg-icon">🥗</span>
      <div class="pkg-name">Veg Package</div>
      <div class="pkg-price">₹700 <span style="font-size:16px">/ plate</span></div>
      <p class="pkg-per">Taxes extra</p>
      <ul class="pkg-features">
        <li>Full vegetarian menu</li>
        <li>Welcome drinks</li>
        <li>Starter + Main Course</li>
        <li>Live counters available</li>
        <li>Basic décor included</li>
      </ul>
      <a href="#booking" class="btn-gold" style="display:block;text-align:center">Enquire</a>
    </div>
    <div class="pkg-card featured reveal" style="transition-delay:.2s">
      <span class="pkg-badge">Most Popular</span>
      <span class="pkg-icon">🎊</span>
      <div class="pkg-name" style="color:#fff">Grand Wedding</div>
      <div class="pkg-price">Custom</div>
      <p class="pkg-per">As per requirement</p>
      <ul class="pkg-features">
        <li>Full event coordination</li>
        <li>Décor & floral setup</li>
        <li>Veg + Non-veg catering</li>
        <li>AV & lighting setup</li>
        <li>42 rooms for guests</li>
        <li>Dedicated event manager</li>
      </ul>
      <a href="#booking" class="btn-gold" style="display:block;text-align:center">Get Quote</a>
    </div>
    <div class="pkg-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.3s">
      <span class="pkg-icon">🍖</span>
      <div class="pkg-name">Non-Veg Package</div>
      <div class="pkg-price">₹850 <span style="font-size:16px">/ plate</span></div>
      <p class="pkg-per">Taxes extra</p>
      <ul class="pkg-features">
        <li>Full non-veg menu</li>
        <li>Welcome drinks</li>
        <li>Starter + Main Course</li>
        <li>Dessert counter</li>
        <li>Basic décor included</li>
      </ul>
      <a href="#booking" class="btn-gold" style="display:block;text-align:center">Enquire</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- GALLERY -->
<section class="gallery" id="gallery">
  <div class="gallery-header reveal">
    <span class="sec-tag" style="color:var(--gold2)">Visual Tour</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">A Glimpse of<br><em style="color:var(--gold2)">Golden Petals</em></h2>
    <div class="divider"><div class="d-line"></div><div class="d-gem"></div><div class="d-line"></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="gallery-grid" id="galleryGrid">
    <!-- The hotel exterior photo goes here first (set by JS) -->
    <div class="gallery-item tall wide reveal" data-idx="0">
      <img id="gal0" src="" alt="Hotel Golden Petals Exterior">
      <div class="gallery-overlay"><span class="gallery-zoom">⊕</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item reveal" style="transition-delay:.1s" data-idx="1">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1631049307264-da0ec9d70304?w=600&q=80" alt="Deluxe Room">
      <div class="gallery-overlay"><span class="gallery-zoom">⊕</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item reveal" style="transition-delay:.2s" data-idx="2">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519167758481-83f550bb49b3?w=600&q=80" alt="Banquet Hall">
      <div class="gallery-overlay"><span class="gallery-zoom">⊕</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item reveal" style="transition-delay:.15s" data-idx="3">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1414235077428-338989a2e8c0?w=600&q=80" alt="Restaurant">
      <div class="gallery-overlay"><span class="gallery-zoom">⊕</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item reveal" style="transition-delay:.25s" data-idx="4">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519225421980-715cb0215aed?w=600&q=80" alt="Wedding Setup">
      <div class="gallery-overlay"><span class="gallery-zoom">⊕</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item reveal" style="transition-delay:.35s" data-idx="5">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551882547-ff40c63fe5fa?w=600&q=80" alt="Lobby">
      <div class="gallery-overlay"><span class="gallery-zoom">⊕</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- REVIEWS -->
<section class="reviews" id="reviews">
  <div class="reviews-header reveal">
    <span class="sec-tag">Guest Voices</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title">What Our Guests <em>Say</em></h2>
    <div class="divider"><div class="d-line"></div><div class="d-gem"></div><div class="d-line"></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="reviews-meta reveal">
    <div class="review-platform">
      <div class="rev-score">4.1</div>
      <div class="rev-info">
        <div class="stars">★★★★☆</div>
        <strong>JustDial</strong>
        <span>448 Ratings & Reviews</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="review-platform">
      <div class="rev-score">5.0</div>
      <div class="rev-info">
        <div class="stars">★★★★★</div>
        <strong>WedMeGood</strong>
        <span>Verified Wedding Reviews</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="review-platform">
      <div class="rev-score">4.3</div>
      <div class="rev-info">
        <div class="stars">★★★★☆</div>
        <strong>Google</strong>
        <span>Guest Reviews</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="reviews-grid">
    <div class="review-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.1s">
      <div class="stars">★★★★★</div>
      <p class="review-text">The banquet hall was beautifully decorated for our reception. The team handled every single detail with such dedication. Food was excellent — all our guests were impressed! Highly recommend for weddings.</p>
      <div class="review-author">Priya & Arjun S.</div>
      <div class="review-via">Verified · Wedding Reception</div>
    </div>
    <div class="review-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.2s">
      <div class="stars">★★★★★</div>
      <p class="review-text">Stayed here for 3 nights during a family event. The rooms are spacious, clean and well-maintained. Staff is warm and professional. Room service is prompt and the food is delicious. Will return!</p>
      <div class="review-author">Rahul Mehta</div>
      <div class="review-via">Verified Stay · Google Review</div>
    </div>
    <div class="review-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.3s">
      <div class="stars">★★★★☆</div>
      <p class="review-text">We hosted our son's birthday party here and it was a huge success. The team set up everything beautifully, the catering was amazing and the hall looked stunning. Great value for money in Gaur City.</p>
      <div class="review-author">Sunita Kapoor, Noida</div>
      <div class="review-via">Verified · Birthday Event · JustDial</div>
    </div>
    <div class="review-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.1s">
      <div class="stars">★★★★★</div>
      <p class="review-text">Booked the banquet hall for a corporate seminar. The AV setup was perfect, food was great, and the staff was extremely cooperative. Location in Gaur City 1 is very convenient. Excellent experience!</p>
      <div class="review-author">Vineet Sharma</div>
      <div class="review-via">Verified · Corporate Event · Google</div>
    </div>
    <div class="review-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.2s">
      <div class="stars">★★★★★</div>
      <p class="review-text">The wedding package they offered was comprehensive and reasonably priced. In-house décor team did a phenomenal job. All 42 rooms were booked for our family — everyone was comfortable and happy.</p>
      <div class="review-author">Anjali & Rohan Verma</div>
      <div class="review-via">Verified · Residential Wedding · WedMeGood</div>
    </div>
    <div class="review-card reveal" style="transition-delay:.3s">
      <div class="stars">★★★★☆</div>
      <p class="review-text">Came for a kitty party with 20 friends — the private setup was lovely, food was delicious and staff was very attentive. The hall décor they put together on short notice was impressive. Great job, team!</p>
      <div class="review-author">Neha Agarwal, Greater Noida</div>
      <div class="review-via">Verified · Kitty Party · JustDial</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- BOOKING / INQUIRY -->
<section id="booking">
  <div class="booking-wrap">
    <div class="booking-info reveal-left">
      <span class="sec-tag" style="color:var(--gold2)">Reservations & Enquiries</span>
      <h2 class="sec-title" style="color:#fff">Book Your Stay<br>or <em style="color:var(--gold2)">Event</em></h2>
      <p>Fill in the form and our team will contact you within 2 hours. For urgent enquiries, reach us directly on WhatsApp for instant confirmation.</p>
      <div class="contact-items">
        <div class="ci">
          <div class="ci-icon">📞</div>
          <div class="ci-text">
            <strong>Phone / WhatsApp</strong>
            <span>+91 92662 71835</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="ci">
          <div class="ci-icon">📍</div>
          <div class="ci-text">
            <strong>Address</strong>
            <span>Cherry County, Gate No. 2, Near Ek Murti Chowk,<br>Gaur City 1, Greater Noida – 201318, U.P.</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="ci">
          <div class="ci-icon">📸</div>
          <div class="ci-text">
            <strong>Instagram</strong>
            <span>@goldenpetals.in</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="ci">
          <div class="ci-icon">🕐</div>
          <div class="ci-text">
            <strong>Check-In / Check-Out</strong>
            <span>Check-in: 12:00 PM &nbsp;|&nbsp; Check-out: 11:00 AM</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="booking-form-wrap reveal-right">
      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-field">
          <label>Your Name</label>
          <input type="text" id="f-name" placeholder="Full Name">
        </div>
        <div class="form-field">
          <label>Phone Number</label>
          <input type="tel" id="f-phone" placeholder="+91 XXXXX XXXXX">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-field">
          <label>Enquiry Type</label>
          <select id="f-type">
            <option value="">Select Type</option>
            <option>Room Booking</option>
            <option>Wedding / Reception</option>
            <option>Birthday Party</option>
            <option>Ring Ceremony / Engagement</option>
            <option>Anniversary</option>
            <option>Mehndi Night</option>
            <option>Kitty Party</option>
            <option>Corporate Event / Seminar</option>
            <option>Baby Shower</option>
            <option>Other Event</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="form-field">
          <label>Expected Date</label>
          <input type="date" id="f-date">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-field">
          <label>No. of Guests</label>
          <select id="f-guests">
            <option>1–20 Guests</option>
            <option>20–50 Guests</option>
            <option>50–100 Guests</option>
            <option>100–200 Guests</option>
            <option>200–350 Guests</option>
            <option>350+ Guests</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="form-field">
          <label>Budget Range</label>
          <select id="f-budget">
            <option>Below ₹50,000</option>
            <option>₹50,000 – ₹1,00,000</option>
            <option>₹1,00,000 – ₹3,00,000</option>
            <option>₹3,00,000 – ₹5,00,000</option>
            <option>Above ₹5,00,000</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-field full" style="margin-bottom:20px">
        <label>Message / Special Requirements</label>
        <textarea id="f-msg" placeholder="Tell us more about your requirements..."></textarea>
      </div>
      <button class="wa-book" onclick="sendWA()">
        <span class="wa-icon">💬</span>
        Send Enquiry via WhatsApp
      </button>
      <p class="form-note">We respond within 2 hours · Available 9 AM – 10 PM</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- LOCATION -->
<div class="location">
  <div class="loc-info reveal-left">
    <span class="sec-tag" style="color:var(--gold2)">Find Us</span>
    <h2 class="sec-title" style="color:#fff">Perfectly<br><em style="color:var(--gold2)">Located</em></h2>
    <div class="loc-details">
      <div class="ld">
        <span class="ld-icon">📍</span>
        <div><strong>Address</strong><span>Cherry County, Gate No. 2, Near Ek Murti Chowk,<br>Gaur City 1, Greater Noida – 201318, U.P.</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="ld">
        <span class="ld-icon">🚗</span>
        <div><strong>Connectivity</strong><span>35 km from IGI Airport · 25 km from Hazrat Nizamuddin Railway Station · Well-connected via Noida–Greater Noida Expressway</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="ld">
        <span class="ld-icon">🏙️</span>
        <div><strong>Nearby</strong><span>Gaur City Mall · Pari Chowk · India Expo Centre · Sector 18 Noida</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <br><br>
    <a href="https://maps.google.com/?q=Hotel+Golden+Petals+Gaur+City+1+Greater+Noida" target="_blank" class="btn-gold" style="display:inline-block">Open in Google Maps ↗</a>
  </div>
  <div class="loc-map">
    <iframe
      src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d3503.0!2d77.4458235!3d28.6019505!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x390cef000fd6097f%3A0xb51fb9dc9ea19650!2sHOTEL%20GOLDEN%20PETALS%20AND%20BANQUETS!5e0!3m2!1sen!2sin!4v1700000000000!5m2!1sen!2sin"
      allowfullscreen loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade">
    </iframe>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-grid">
    <div>
      <span class="foot-logo">Golden <span>Petals</span></span>
      <p class="foot-desc">A premier hotel and banquet destination in the heart of Gaur City 1, Greater Noida. Experience warmth, comfort, and gracious hospitality at its finest.</p>
      <div class="foot-socials">
        <a class="foot-social" href="https://www.instagram.com/goldenpetals.in" target="_blank">📸</a>
        <a class="foot-social" href="https://wa.me/919266271835" target="_blank">💬</a>
        <a class="foot-social" href="tel:+919266271835">📞</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <span class="foot-heading">Quick Links</span>
      <ul class="foot-links">
        <li><a href="#about">About Us</a></li>
        <li><a href="#rooms">Rooms & Suites</a></li>
        <li><a href="#events">Events</a></li>
        <li><a href="#banquet">Banquet Hall</a></li>
        <li><a href="#gallery">Gallery</a></li>
        <li><a href="#booking">Book Now</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div>
      <span class="foot-heading">Events We Host</span>
      <ul class="foot-links">
        <li><a href="#booking">Weddings & Receptions</a></li>
        <li><a href="#booking">Birthday Parties</a></li>
        <li><a href="#booking">Ring Ceremony</a></li>
        <li><a href="#booking">Mehndi Functions</a></li>
        <li><a href="#booking">Kitty Parties</a></li>
        <li><a href="#booking">Corporate Events</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div>
      <span class="foot-heading">Contact</span>
      <ul class="foot-links" style="gap:8px">
        <li><a href="tel:+919266271835">+91 92662 71835</a></li>
        <li><a href="https://wa.me/919266271835" target="_blank">WhatsApp Us</a></li>
        <li><a href="https://www.instagram.com/goldenpetals.in" target="_blank">@goldenpetals.in</a></li>
        <li style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);font-size:13px;padding-top:6px">Cherry County, Gate 2,<br>Gaur City 1, Greater Noida,<br>U.P. – 201318</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="foot-bottom">
    <span>© 2025 Hotel Golden Petals & Banquets. All rights reserved.</span>
    <span>Made with ♥ in Greater Noida &nbsp;·&nbsp; <a href="https://wa.me/919266271835">Contact Us</a></span>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
// ——— INJECT HOTEL PHOTO ———
const HOTEL_PHOTO = 'data:image/png;base64,';
document.getElementById('heroBg').style.backgroundImage = `url('${HOTEL_PHOTO}')`;
document.getElementById('aboutImg').src = HOTEL_PHOTO;
document.getElementById('gal0').src = HOTEL_PHOTO;

// Gallery lightbox images
const galleryImgs = [
  HOTEL_PHOTO,
  'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1631049307264-da0ec9d70304?w=1200&q=80',
  'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519167758481-83f550bb49b3?w=1200&q=80',
  'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1414235077428-338989a2e8c0?w=1200&q=80',
  'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519225421980-715cb0215aed?w=1200&q=80',
  'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551882547-ff40c63fe5fa?w=1200&q=80'
];
let lbIdx = 0;

// ——— NAV SCROLL ———
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  document.getElementById('nav').classList.toggle('scrolled', scrollY > 60);
});

// ——— REVEAL ON SCROLL ———
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); observer.unobserve(e.target); }});
}, { threshold: 0.12 });
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal,.reveal-left,.reveal-right').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

// ——— LIGHTBOX ———
document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-item').forEach(item => {
  item.addEventListener('click', () => openLB(parseInt(item.dataset.idx)));
});
function openLB(i) {
  lbIdx = i;
  document.getElementById('lb-img').src = galleryImgs[i];
  document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
}
function closeLB() {
  document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}
function lbNav(dir) {
  lbIdx = (lbIdx + dir + galleryImgs.length) % galleryImgs.length;
  document.getElementById('lb-img').src = galleryImgs[lbIdx];
}
document.getElementById('lightbox').addEventListener('click', function(e){ if(e.target===this) closeLB(); });
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if(e.key==='Escape') closeLB(); if(e.key==='ArrowRight') lbNav(1); if(e.key==='ArrowLeft') lbNav(-1); });

// ——— MOBILE MENU ———
function toggleMob() { document.getElementById('mobile-menu').classList.toggle('open'); }
function closeMob() { document.getElementById('mobile-menu').classList.remove('open'); }

// ——— WHATSAPP ENQUIRY ———
function sendWA() {
  const name = document.getElementById('f-name').value.trim() || 'Guest';
  const phone = document.getElementById('f-phone').value.trim();
  const type = document.getElementById('f-type').value || 'General Enquiry';
  const date = document.getElementById('f-date').value;
  const guests = document.getElementById('f-guests').value;
  const budget = document.getElementById('f-budget').value;
  const msg = document.getElementById('f-msg').value.trim();

  const text = `*Hotel Golden Petals – New Enquiry* 🌸

👤 *Name:* ${name}
📞 *Phone:* ${phone || 'Not provided'}
🎊 *Type:* ${type}
📅 *Date:* ${date || 'Not specified'}
👥 *Guests:* ${guests}
💰 *Budget:* ${budget}
📝 *Message:* ${msg || 'No additional message'}

_Sent via website enquiry form_`;

  window.open(`https://wa.me/919266271835?text=${encodeURIComponent(text)}`, '_blank');
}
</script>

</body>
</html>
